name: @graphorin/benchmark-dialogue-smoke
description: Lightweight dialogue smoke test for the Graphorin framework. Seeds a few fixed user/assistant turns, persists a salient fact to semantic memory, and asserts hybrid search (FTS-only without an embedder) recovers it. This is a wiring smoke check, NOT the published DialSim benchmark (arXiv:2406.13144). Created and maintained by Oleksiy Stepurenko.
author: Oleksiy Stepurenko
